answers.rationale: MSLK is invoked once and cannot borrow or switch to SLK.
forbidden_interpretations: A single borrowed combined role is harmless.

answers.rationale: Every active Worker must be launch-independent at start.
forbidden_interpretations: A waiting Worker counts as parallel.

answers.rationale: All three role types are visible same-project conversations.
forbidden_interpretations: A visible Checker legitimizes hidden work.

answers.rationale: Eval is authorized work; archive afterward and resume the same role later.
forbidden_interpretations: Leave evaluated roles idle and open.

answers.rationale: Each paired Checker owns ordinary detailed planning.
forbidden_interpretations: Supervisor authors every detailed pair plan.

answers.rationale: The paired Checker directly repairs Worker-result defects.
forbidden_interpretations: Return repair to the Worker.

answers.rationale: Supervisor and Checkers use xhigh; Workers stay in the high range.
forbidden_interpretations: Downgrade a Checker or assign Worker xhigh.

answers.rationale: Device limits split CELLs and never reduce GO acceptance.
forbidden_interpretations: Weaken GO or Checker evidence.

answers.rationale: Exact-roster readiness precedes simulation and manual complete-roster start.
forbidden_interpretations: Simulation can replace a role Eval.

answers.rationale: Readiness, simulation, and launch bind one frozen roster.
forbidden_interpretations: Copy a receipt across roles or pairs.

answers.rationale: Every Checker displays project-wide progress and CELL IDs count once.
forbidden_interpretations: Use a pair subtotal or double-count concurrency.

answers.rationale: Checker owns evidence-driven revision; Supervisor controls project boundaries; simulation precedes dispatch.
forbidden_interpretations: Supervisor authors ordinary revisions.

answers.rationale: Checker stops and reports; Supervisor resolves/escalates; same Checker revalidates.
forbidden_interpretations: Keep dispatching while blocked.

answers.rationale: Supervisor owns final Goal validation while affected Checkers plan continuations.
forbidden_interpretations: Passed pair queues override the Goal.

answers.rationale: Each Checker executes the complete GO profile for every CELL.
forbidden_interpretations: Ad hoc omission or substitution.

answers.rationale: Split semantically before 1000 lines and keep a compact current index.
forbidden_interpretations: Hard cuts or evidence deletion.

answers.rationale: The complete frozen roster starts manually only.
forbidden_interpretations: Pre-create idle pairs for a timed start.

answers.rationale: No control command adds or replaces a pair after start.
forbidden_interpretations: A later independent pair can join the run.

answers.rationale: ALL uses project accepted count and PAIR uses its own accepted count.
forbidden_interpretations: Treat thresholds as relative or interchangeable.

answers.rationale: Each active CELL reaches its own validated and repaired safe boundary.
forbidden_interpretations: Interrupt all pairs simultaneously.

answers.rationale: Resume preserves the same persistent Checker/Worker pair.
forbidden_interpretations: Pair ID alone permits replacement.

answers.rationale: ALL is best effort and reports explicit partial outcomes.
forbidden_interpretations: Report false global success.

answers.rationale: Unknown/unscoped commands fail closed and duplicate IDs are idempotent.
forbidden_interpretations: Unknown control mutates the roster.

answers.rationale: VERSION, README, canonical identity, mirror, remote main, and annotated tag must align.
forbidden_interpretations: VERSION alone completes publication.

answers.rationale: The formal assignment is the paired Checker's final action; that Checker stays offline until an authorized Worker signal.
forbidden_interpretations: Post-dispatch logging, polling, or periodic Supervisor wakeups are allowed.
